name: railway-letter-system
description: Railway Letter Management System (RLMS) - MERN Stack

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.predev: npm run stop:server && lsof -ti :5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :5174 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.stop:server: lsof -ti :5001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'mongodb-binaries/mongod.*server/.memory-db/rlms' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'server/.memory-db/rlms' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'railway-letter-system/server/node_modules/.bin/nodemon' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; rm -f server/.memory-db/rlms/mongod.lock 2>/dev/null; true
